RIA0_source_surface_verified.description: Consumes explicit closure-radius implementation receipt and prior control surfaces by exact id.

RIA10_demo_only_metrics_classify_as_awai.description: Demo-only metrics produce AWAIT_REAL_BATCH_RECEIPTS, not a build command.

RIA11_pressure_objective_is_proposal_not.description: Dominant pressure may open objective proposal, not direct implementation command.

RIA13_classifier_does_not_optimize_or_in.description: Adapter does not optimize or invent roadmap.

RIA14_no_authority_widening_global_plann.description: No authority widening, global planner, final roadmap, or proof claim.

RIA1_question_set_declared.description: Fixed receipt interrogation question set is declared.

RIA2_answer_schema_requires_evidence_fie.description: Answers must point to receipt fields.

RIA3_pressure_classes_declared.description: Pressure classes include NONE, repair, authority, taxonomy, burden, receipt/trace, extraction, frontier, real batch, ambiguous, invalid.

RIA4_next_command_classifier_declared.description: Classifier emits finite next command classes.

RIA5_failed_gate_maps_to_repair.description: Failed gate emits repair class only.

RIA6_trace_mismatch_maps_to_receipt_repa.description: Trace mismatch emits receipt repair class.

RIA7_unauthorized_execution_maps_to_poli.description: Authority/radius integrity violation emits policy repair class.

RIA8_declared_next_command_only_exact_af.description: Populated next_command_goal allows only exact declared command after authority check.

RIA9_stop_done_null_next_closes_lane_unl.description: STOP_DONE with null next closes lane unless pressure/evidence wait remains.

day7_receipt_interrogation_demo_plan.interpretation: The Day 7 lane is closed, but the metrics are demo-only, so no build command is licensed by the receipt alone.

law: classifier emits command class, not creative roadmap
OPEN_OBJECTIVE_PROPOSAL_FROM_PRESSURE_CLASS is proposal-only and not an implementation command
AWAIT_REAL_BATCH_RECEIPTS is not a build command
STOP_LANE_CLOSED is terminal unless a new external objective is opened
classifier must not optimize, widen authority, or claim global planning

rules_ordered.if: unauthorized movement counted as radius or authority integrity violated

rules_ordered.guard: only exact declared command after authority check

rules_ordered.if: STOP_DONE and next_command_goal is null and no pressure remains
STOP_DONE and next_command_goal is null and metrics are demo-only

policy_summary.core_law: The adapter classifies licensed next-boundary state; it does not invent the next project.
policy_summary.non_goal: no roadmap invention, no optimization, no authority widening, no proof claim, no hidden command after STOP_DONE
policy_summary.purpose: Given an implementation receipt, ask a fixed question set and classify the receipt-licensed next-boundary state.

classification_rules.AMBIGUOUS_PRESSURE: more than one live pressure class is plausible and no dominant evidence field resolves it
classification_rules.AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY: receipt shows STOP_AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY, STOP_HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, STOP_PROPOSAL_REQUIRED, STOP_FORBIDDEN_MOVE, or unauthorized execution
classification_rules.BURDEN_PRESSURE: receipt shows burden_pressure_count > 0, receipt burden expansion, or trace density pressure
classification_rules.EXTRACTION_PRESSURE: receipt shows STOP_NEEDS_EXTRACTION or unresolved extraction dependency
classification_rules.FRONTIER_PRESSURE: receipt shows STOP_FRONTIER or frontier boundary
classification_rules.INVALID_RECEIPT_SURFACE: receipt missing gate, terminal, target unit, receipt id, or required source links
classification_rules.MISSING_MOVE_PRESSURE: receipt shows STOP_NEEDS_NEW_MOVE, STOP_NO_APPLICABLE_MOVE, missing move delta, or move registry gap
classification_rules.NONE: gate PASS, terminal STOP_DONE, next_command_goal null, no live pressure metrics, no missing evidence
classification_rules.REAL_BATCH_REQUIRED: receipt gate PASS with demo-only metrics and no real batch receipts
classification_rules.TAXONOMY_PRESSURE: receipt shows STOP_TAXONOMY_GAP, undertyped/untyped object or unresolved taxonomy pressure

law: pressure can license a proposal or evidence wait, not necessarily a build command
dominant pressure must not hide secondary pressure

answer_law: every nontrivial answer must cite a receipt field
missing receipt fields must produce INVALID_RECEIPT_SURFACE or QUESTION_PACKET_NOT_COMMAND
answers may classify pressure but must not invent commands

law: questions do not invent objective details
questions do not authorize work by themselves

questions.question: What unit/lane did this receipt close?
What artifact IDs/paths were produced or accepted?
What distinction did this receipt preserve?
What must not be counted as success?
Did the receipt emit STOP_DONE, ADVANCE, or another STOP code?
If null, is the lane actually closed or merely waiting for external input?
What pressure class remains, if any?
Is there evidence for a dominant bottleneck?
If yes, which receipt fields prove it?
If no, what is the smallest lawful next evidence-gathering objective?
Is optimization forbidden at this point?
Is a new objective allowed, or must the loop stop?
